content.speakerText: Please be at Gate 5 10 minutes before departure. Don’t forget your belongings!
content.speakerTextCn: 请在发车前10分钟到达5号门，别忘了随身物品！

options.text: Can I bring my pet on board?

content.explanation: 正确答案'I’ll be there right away.'是对提醒的直接回应，表示会按时到达，符合语境。其他选项分别询问宠物、票价和洗手间，与提醒内容无关，属于干扰项。

content.speakerText: The driver will announce stops. If you need help, press the call button.
content.speakerTextCn: 司机将播报站点，如有需要请按呼叫按钮。

options.text: I’ll press the button if I need help.
Can I get off at the next stop?
Do you have Wi-Fi on board?
What time does the bus leave?

content.explanation: 正确答案'I’ll press the button if I need help.'准确回应了关于呼叫按钮的提示，表达确认。其他选项询问下车、Wi-Fi或发车时间，偏离了当前提醒的核心内容。

content.speakerText: Your flight is boarding soon. Please have your boarding pass ready and follow the signs to Gate 7.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的航班即将登机，请准备好登机牌并跟随指示前往7号登机口。

options.text: I’ll make sure to have it ready.
Is there a luggage storage nearby?

content.explanation: 正确答案'I’ll make sure to have it ready.'是对提醒的积极回应，体现配合态度。其他选项涉及改座、行李寄存和飞行时长，属于无关问题，不符合道别与提醒场景的回应逻辑。
